basics.name: Anthony NDUKA, C.S.Sp
basics.label: Data Scientist | AI Researcher | Catholic Priest
basics.summary: Data scientist and AI researcher with applied experience in machine learning, healthcare analytics, and ethical AI. Combines technical depth (Python, SQL, ML) with interdisciplinary insights from theology and philosophy. Passionate about building technologies for social impact.

work.name: Spiritan University
highlights: Teach Python programming, Pandas, and data visualization to undergraduates
Develop Jupyter Notebook tutorials for ML workflows (Scikit-learn, TensorFlow)

work.name: Spiritan Healthcare Apostolate
highlights: Built predictive models for elderly care (86.96% accuracy)
Digitized medical records to improve coordination across dioceses
Served 155+ elderly across 4 dioceses using proactive data systems

work.name: Spiritan Provincialate
highlights: Recognized by the Spiritan Generalate as Best Data Management Secretary (2022)
Streamlined document digitization and provincial record systems

projects.name: INEC Voting System (Distributed Database)
highlights: Designed fault-tolerant system for electoral data

projects.name: Cardiovascular Disease Predictor
highlights: Achieved 86.96% classification accuracy using UCI dataset

projects.name: Prosper Loan Default Analysis
highlights: Identified top risk factors for loan defaults (15% risk reduction)

publications.name: Real-Time Edge Analytics for IoT Networks
Leveraging Big Data and IoT in Media Industry
publications.summary: Explores data and IoT for optimizing media content creation and delivery. Under review.

publications.name: Quantum Computing in Healthcare
publications.summary: Uses quantum computing for diagnostics, drug design, and personalized medicine. Under review.
